name: General Tso's Chicken (Easy)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds chicken, cut into 3/4 in cubes
3 tbsp each soy sauce, corn starch, sugar, white vinegar, Chinese cooking wine
3 tbsp Chinese chili paste with garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip chicken in egg.
2. Coat chicken with flour.
3. Fry the chicken until golden brown.
4. In a bowl, mix water, soy sauce, corn starch, vinegar, hoisin sauce, Chinese cooking wine, sugar, chili paste, black peppercorns, and cayenne.
5. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry garlic and ginger.
6. Add peppers and bok choy to the pan; fry for a few seconds.
7. Add the sauce mixture and chicken to the pan; stir until the sauce thickens and coats the meat.
8. Serve over rice.
